description: 26 free OSINT tools as MCP tools for AI agents. Auto-installs everything on first run.
name: io.github.rjn32s/osint-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional: Shodan API key for host/port lookups. Free tier at https://account.shodan.io
environmentVariables.name: SHODAN_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional: VirusTotal API key for URL/IP/hash scanning. Free at https://virustotal.com
environmentVariables.name: VIRUSTOTAL_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional: ipinfo.io API key for IP geolocation. 50k req/month free.
environmentVariables.name: IPINFO_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional: HaveIBeenPwned API key for email breach lookups.
environmentVariables.name: HIBP_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional: urlscan.io API key for URL scanning.
environmentVariables.name: URLSCAN_KEY

title: OSINT MCP
